final_output:
The test file has been written to `/home/user/test_functions.py`. Here's a summary of what's covered:

---

### `validate_email` — 14 tests

| Category | Tests |
|---|---|
| **Normal cases** | 9 parametrized valid emails (standard, subdomains, plus-tags, numeric, uppercase, mixed case, multi-level TLDs) |
| **Falsy inputs** | Empty string `""` and `None` |
| **Missing `@`** | String with no `@` symbol |
| **Multiple `@`** | `user@domain@extra.com` (split produces >2 parts) |
| **Missing local part** | `@domain.com` |
| **Missing domain part** | `user@` |
| **No dot in domain** | `user@localhost` |
| **Weird but valid** | `@.` (passes all rules) |
| **Whitespace** | Leading whitespace (passes — no trimming), whitespace-only string (fails — no `@`) |
| **Non-string inputs** | Integer → `AttributeError`, list → `TypeError` |

---

### `calculate_area` — 21 tests

| Category | Tests |
|---|---|
| **Rectangle** | Normal, zero dimensions, float dimensions, large values, negative dimensions |
| **Circle** | Normal, zero radius, float radius, large radius, negative radius (squared → positive) |
| **Triangle** | Normal, zero dimensions, float dimensions, negative dimensions |
| **Unknown shape** | `"hexagon"` and `""` → `ValueError` with matching message |
| **Missing kwargs** | Missing `width`, `height`, `radius`, `base` → `KeyError` |
| **Extra kwargs** | Silently ignored (e.g., `color="red"`) |
| **Case sensitivity** | `"Rectangle"` → `ValueError` |
| **Shape as keyword** | `shape="rectangle"` works correctly |

---

**Note:** Update the import line `from your_module import validate_email, calculate_area` to point to wherever your actual code lives. Run with `pytest test_functions.py -v`.

---

### `validate_email` — 14 tests

| Category | Tests |
|---|---|
| **Normal cases** | 9 parametrized valid emails (standard, subdomains, plus-tags, numeric, uppercase, mixed case, multi-level TLDs) |
| **Falsy inputs** | Empty string `""` and `None` |
| **Missing `@`** | String with no `@` symbol |
| **Multiple `@`** | `user@domain@extra.com` (split produces >2 parts) |
| **Missing local part** | `@domain.com` |
| **Missing domain part** | `user@` |

### `calculate_area` — 21 tests

| Category | Tests |
|---|---|
| **Rectangle** | Normal, zero dimensions, float dimensions, large values, negative dimensions |
| **Circle** | Normal, zero radius, float radius, large radius, negative radius (squared → positive) |
| **Triangle** | Normal, zero dimensions, float dimensions, negative dimensions |
| **Unknown shape** | `"hexagon"` and `""` → `ValueError` with matching message |
| **Missing kwargs** | Missing `width`, `height`, `radius`, `base` → `KeyError` |
| **Extra kwargs** | Silently ignored (e.g., `color="red"`) |
| **Case sensitivity** | `"Rectangle"` → `ValueError` |
| **Shape as keyword** | `shape="rectangle"` works correctly |
